# kCFProxyUsernameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFProxyUsernameKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyusernamekey)

-  kCFProxyUsernameKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyUsernameKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyUsernameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyusernamekey#Discussion)

The username to be used when contacting the proxy. This key is only present if the username can be determined from the information passed in. (External credential stores such as the keychain are not consulted.)
